title: The Problem + Solution
intro: Get the facts about the youth unemployment crisis, financial exclusion, and the academic achievement gap.

sections.heading: The Problem
sections.body:
Low-income young people face interlocking barriers to opportunity:

- Youth unemployment crisis
- Financial exclusion
- The academic achievement gap

sections.heading: The Solution
sections.body: Juma's model addresses these barriers head-on through employment, financial capability, and educational support.

seoDescription: The problem Juma addresses: the youth unemployment crisis, financial exclusion, and the academic achievement gap — and Juma's solution for low-income young people.
